# addNodeAndSave

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for addNodeAndSave

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useAddNodeAndSaveMutation(); mutate({ input: '<AddNodeAndSaveInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useAddNodeAndSaveMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useAddNodeAndSaveMutation();
mutate({ input: '<AddNodeAndSaveInput>' });
```
